title: One Last Kiss Full Version
wikitext:
[]: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Mar 08, 2021 3:28 pm It's on youtube but I cannot find any translations. Full lyrics? Anybody? We can proceed to discuss them.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by Joseki » Mon Mar 08, 2021 3:35 pm Romanji https://genius.com/Genius-romanizations ... zed-lyrics English translation https://genius.com/Genius-english-trans ... ion-lyrics

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Mar 08, 2021 3:56 pm Thank you! Seems like I searched all the lyrics sites but the one that ended up having it. TBH it could've packed a bit more oomph both lyrically & musically compared to the other musical entries. The overall emphasis is not entirely what I'd predicted though I must say there's something very touching about this emphasis on treasuring precious memories. I hope to get a second opinion/in depht on the end of the second verse. Now I really wanna see that one 'unofficial image song' by Ogata and the new beautiful world version if it wasn't just a rumor.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by Joseki » Mon Mar 08, 2021 4:03 pm The Beautiful World new edit was officially announced today, coming to digital platforms at midnight (so in 2 hours in my case) https://www.utadahikaru.jp/en/news/deta ... ?id=527439 They also announced an Asuka version of the vinyl https://www.utadahikaru.jp/en/news/deta ... ?id=527482

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by GhostlyOcam » Mon Mar 08, 2021 4:08 pm The EP is already available to stream in my area (Indonesia). Here's my impressions: The new Beautiful World is indeed real and it's a completely new arrange than a remix, in fact it's the EP's second track and the transition from OLK to Shin BW is so seamless they're essentially a medley! Both songs are great and I liked OLK a hell lot more than I expected. I once said it sounds like an Ed Sheeran song in a bad way but having listened to it from start to finish, I can say I genuinely liked it. Hell, I LOVED it even. Utada never misses.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by Joseki » Mon Mar 08, 2021 4:14 pm OLK, especially the second chorus, reminded me of Face My Fears, the song she made with Skrillex for Kingdom Hearts III. It doesn't go "club" as hard, but the influences are there in terms of production.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by GhostlyOcam » Mon Mar 08, 2021 4:24 pm Yeah, the second half definitely has that strong EDM feel but in a way that really immersed me than taking me out of it. Curious on how I'll feel about it once I've seen the film but, those who've seen it think the song really fits so that's encouraging.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Mar 08, 2021 4:31 pm GhostlyOcam wrote: those who've seen it think the song really fits so that's encouraging.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by Joseki » Mon Mar 08, 2021 6:14 pm Damn the new version of BW is really special. I imagine the moment it plays must be REALLY powerful. EDIT: reflecting a bit on it, you can see a direct line connecting Sakura Nagashi and One Last Kiss. Beautiful work Hikki.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Mar 08, 2021 6:27 pm Joseki wrote: Damn the new version of BW is really special. I imagine the moment it plays must be REALLY powerful.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by Joseki » Mon Mar 08, 2021 6:51 pm I actually imagined playing when Shinji gets inside Unit 01 for some reason. There is just a sense of finality to it that made me feel like I could see Unit 01 slowly walking in a distorted, hurt world but yet still full of hope. The juxtaposition of the most feared being in the universe moving towards a future of peace. I'm sure I'm totally wrong but that's the beauty of speculating.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Mon Mar 08, 2021 6:52 pm Kendrix wrote: Just heard it.(it's on youtube now)

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by Joseki » Mon Mar 08, 2021 6:54 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: Link Please?

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Mon Mar 08, 2021 6:55 pm Darn it, unavailable

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Mar 08, 2021 6:56 pm Joseki wrote: I actually imagined playing when Shinji gets inside Unit 01 for some reason. There is just a sense of finality to it that made me feel like I could see Unit 01 slowly walking in a distorted, hurt world but yet still full of hope. The juxtaposition of the most feared being in the universe moving towards a future of peace. I'm sure I'm totally wrong but that's the beauty of speculating.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by Joseki » Mon Mar 08, 2021 6:57 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: Darn it, unavailable

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Mon Mar 08, 2021 7:05 pm There is an explanation on Evangelion's official website why this version was created, by the way. Edit: I'm listening right now using a VPN. I really liked!

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by Joseki » Tue Mar 09, 2021 5:17 am Thanks for the link, I don't follow anything Eva related anymore so I didn't know they talked openly about it.

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Tue Mar 09, 2021 1:44 pm Just for curiosity. "One Last Kiss" is number one on Amazon and Apple Music: Apple Music  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: One Last Kiss Full Version             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Mar 09, 2021 2:06 pm I assure you that half those views are Me. Still makes you see how many of us there are worldwide You could probably fill a small country with just all the eva fans at least were not the only ones waiting
